landing.testimonials.title: Why citizens love it
landing.testimonials.q1: I never thought picking up litter could earn me free metro rides. My weekly walks feel different now.
landing.testimonials.q1.author: Nino, Vake district
landing.testimonials.q2: The leaderboard got my whole apartment block competing. Our street has never been cleaner.
landing.testimonials.q2.author: Giorgi, Saburtalo
landing.testimonials.q3: Being recognized on the City Hall display made my grandkids so proud. That meant more than any voucher.
landing.testimonials.q3.author: Babo Tamuna, Old Tbilisi
landing.final.title: Ready to join?
landing.footer.tagline: A civic platform built for Tbilisi.

news.title: News
news.pilot.title: Pilot launches in Vake district
news.pilot.body: Tbilisi City Hall has signed the pilot memorandum. First validated deeds are being logged today.
news.milestone.title: 10,000 citizens have joined
news.milestone.body: Less than a month in and the community has crossed five-figure registrations. Sanitation cost offset on track for ₾2.1M Year 1.
news.partner.title: Magti joins as CSR partner
news.partner.body: Free mobile data top-ups for top-level contributors. Redeemable from the Rewards tab starting next week.
news.cotyOpen.title: Citizen of the Year 2026 nominations open
news.cotyOpen.body: The Mayor's office will co-sign one annual digital badge. Top contributors across all districts qualify.
submit.demoNotice: Demo mode — any photo or video earns points instantly. No AI validation.
submit.proof.optional: Optional — proof file (skip for instant points)
page.about.title: About Tbilisi Care
page.about.missionBody: Tbilisi Care converts everyday acts of kindness into measurable civic impact. Citizens do small good deeds — clean a street, feed a stray, help a senior — and earn points redeemable for real-world rewards from City Hall and partner businesses.
page.about.how1: Do a small good deed in Tbilisi.
page.about.how2: Snap a photo or video as proof.
page.about.how4: Earn points, climb levels, redeem rewards.
page.news.title: News
page.news.sub: Updates from City Hall and partners
page.partners.title: Partners
page.partners.ctaBody: Want your business to appear in our Rewards marketplace? Get in touch.
page.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
page.privacy.body: We collect the minimum data needed to validate good deeds and award points: your name, phone or email, profile photo, deed videos/photos, and approximate GPS at submission. Data is stored on servers in Georgia and we do not sell or share personal information with third parties. You can request deletion at any time via the Contact page.
page.terms.title: Terms of Service
page.terms.body: By using Tbilisi Care you agree to submit only your own genuine acts. Fraudulent submissions, AI-generated proofs, and duplicate accounts result in permanent suspension and forfeit of points and rewards. Points have no cash value and cannot be transferred between accounts. Rewards are redeemable subject to partner inventory.
page.contact.title: Contact us
terms.hero.desc: These terms govern your use of TbilisiCare — Tbilisi's civic good-deed platform. Please read them carefully before participating.
terms.never.title: Never do this
terms.never.1: Submit fake, AI-generated, or staged proof
terms.s1.title: Acceptance of Terms
terms.s1.body: By creating an account or using TbilisiCare you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.
terms.s2.title: Your Responsibilities
terms.s2.1: Submit only your own genuine, real-world good deeds.
terms.s2.2: Do not submit AI-generated, edited, or staged photo/video proof.
terms.s2.3: Do not create duplicate or shared accounts.
terms.s2.4: Do not impersonate other citizens or organisations.
terms.s2.5: Do not attempt to manipulate the points or leaderboard system.
terms.s3.title: CarePoints & Rewards
terms.s3.1: CarePoints have no monetary or cash-equivalent value.
terms.s3.2: Points cannot be transferred between accounts.
terms.s3.3: Rewards are subject to partner availability and inventory.
terms.s3.4: TbilisiCare reserves the right to adjust point values at any time.
terms.s4.title: Violations & Suspension
terms.s4.body: Fraudulent submissions, AI-generated proof, duplicate accounts, or any attempt to abuse the platform will result in permanent account suspension and forfeiture of all accumulated CarePoints and rewards — without appeal.
terms.s5.title: Changes to These Terms
terms.s5.body: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of TbilisiCare after changes constitutes acceptance. The "Last updated" date reflects the most recent revision.
terms.contact.sub: Our team is happy to clarify anything.
privacy.hero.desc: Your privacy matters. We collect the minimum data needed to run TbilisiCare and never sell or share your personal information.
privacy.collected.title: Data We Collect
privacy.c1.label: Name & display name
privacy.c1.detail: Used to identify you in the community
privacy.c2.label: Email or phone number
privacy.c3.label: Profile photo
privacy.c4.label: Deed photos & videos
privacy.c4.detail: Submitted as proof of your good deeds
privacy.c5.label: Approximate GPS location
privacy.c5.detail: Recorded at deed submission time only
privacy.c6.label: Device & browser info
privacy.use.title: How We Use It
privacy.store.title: Storage & Security
privacy.store.1: Data stored on servers in Georgia
privacy.store.4: Access limited to authorised staff only
privacy.third.title: Third Parties
privacy.third.body: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes. We use Firebase (Google) for authentication and storage. Partner organisations only receive anonymised aggregate statistics — never individual personal data.
privacy.gps.title: About Location Data
privacy.gps.body: We record an approximate GPS coordinate only at the moment you submit a deed. We do not track your location continuously or in the background. Location data is used solely to verify the geographic context of submitted deeds.
privacy.rights.title: Your Rights
privacy.r1.title: Access your data
privacy.r1.body: Request a full export of the personal data we hold about you at any time.
privacy.r2.title: Delete your account
privacy.r2.body: Request permanent deletion of your account and all associated data via the Contact page.
privacy.r3.title: Correct inaccurate data
privacy.r3.body: Ask us to correct any personal information that is wrong or out of date.
ai.title: TbilisiCare Assistant
ai.welcome: Hello! I'm the TbilisiCare assistant. Ask me about earning points, uploading photos, or redeeming rewards.
ai.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
